title: Complete JWT auth migration and schema alignment
description: Refactor authentication system to consolidate JWT-based auth (already implemented in AuthService/JwtService) and align Users collection schema. Keep session-store.ts and user-store.ts as deprecated stubs. Update Users collection fields to use RbacRole (admin/editor/viewer), remove session-specific fields, and create Payload database migration for schema changes. All API routes already use withAuth HOC.
existing_patterns: src/auth/auth-service.ts: JWT-based auth with RbacRole type, PBKDF2 password verification, token refresh/rotation
src/auth/withAuth.ts: HOC wrapper with role-based access control via checkRole
src/auth/_auth.ts: ROLE_HIERARCHY for admin>editor>viewer, extractBearerToken utility
src/collections/Users.ts: Payload collection with role select field using admin/editor/viewer
src/migrations/index.ts: Migration registry pattern using Payload migrate CLI
